name: hexa-lsp
description: Wire the hexa-lang LSP server (`hexa lsp`) for `.hexa` files in Claude Code. Minimal scope: only `.hexa` is claimed. LSP config carried in plugin-root `.lsp.json` (the canonical Claude Code LSP filename — dot-prefixed; auto-discovered, no manifest field needed). Spawns via `sh -c` so cwd is set to `$HOME/.hx/packages/hexa-lang` (or `$HEXA_LANG`) before `exec hexa lsp` — upstream `hexa lsp` resolves `self/lsp.hexa` relative to cwd, so without this cd the LSP boot fails with a misleading 'source file not found' (/doctor crash trail). Requires `hexa` on PATH; if absent, Claude Code surfaces the error in /plugin Errors.
